title: Target Account 01 planning UAE expansion
summary: Research suggests the company is preparing first hires and entity setup work in the UAE.
notes: Good EOR-led watch candidate. Add the real company name in the enclosing manual_signals source.

title: Target Account 02 building Saudi payroll operations
summary: Signals indicate local payroll ownership and compliance operations are growing in Saudi Arabia.

title: Target Account 03 standardizing people systems across MENA
summary: The business appears to be maturing HR systems and people operations across multiple regional teams.

title: Target Account 04 opening first Gulf commercial team
summary: Regional launch activity suggests a market-entry motion with likely employment infrastructure needs.
notes: Use when the company is entering a target market without obvious local HR/payroll infrastructure.

title: Target Account 05 growing distributed UAE and Egypt workforce
summary: Workforce growth appears split across UAE and Egypt, increasing payroll and compliance complexity.
notes: Useful for payroll plus broader platform conversations.

title: Target Account 06 reviewing HR stack for regional scale
summary: People operations maturity signals suggest the current HR tooling may not fit regional growth.
notes: Good HRIS-led entry point with possible payroll adjacency.

title: Target Account 07 testing Saudi market before local entity
summary: The company appears to be exploring initial in-country hiring before full local infrastructure is built.
notes: Strong EOR candidate if the evidence is real.

title: Target Account 08 scaling regional operations leadership
summary: Operational leadership buildout suggests cross-border team management and compliance needs are increasing.
notes: Useful when there is a credible regional operating signal but buyer mapping is still incomplete.

title: Target Account 09 revisiting prior UAE opportunity
summary: A previously interesting UAE account should be reviewed again due to renewed activity or timing.
notes: Use in the Reactivation lane rather than the strategic account lane when this came from old pipeline work.

title: Target Account 10 partner-led hiring channel into GCC
summary: A recruiting or staffing intermediary appears able to support placement into GCC markets.
notes: Use for partner-channel opportunities rather than direct-client outreach.
